question_text: Two identical plastic rods are rubbed with cloth. Rod A is rubbed with wool and gains a negative charge of 8 units. Rod B is rubbed with silk and gains a positive charge of 8 units. What will happen when the two rods are brought close together?

options.label: A
options.text: The rods will repel each other strongly

options.label: B
options.text: The rods will attract each other strongly

options.label: C
options.text: The rods will neither attract nor repel

options.label: D
options.text: The rods will become neutral and stick together

explanation: Opposite charges attract each other. Rod A has a negative charge and Rod B has a positive charge, so they will experience an attractive force. The equal magnitude of charge means the force will be strong.
